# Emerald City Limos

> Seattle's premier luxury limousine service since 2010. Professional chauffeur-driven transportation across the Greater Puget Sound region of Washington State.

## Company Overview

Emerald City Limos is a luxury limousine and black car service headquartered in Seattle, Washington. Founded in 2010, the company provides professional chauffeur-driven transportation for airport transfers, corporate events, weddings, special occasions, cruise terminal transfers, game day transport, hourly charters, wine tours, and executive transportation.

- **Business Name:** Emerald City Limos
- **Business Type:** Luxury Limousine & Black Car Service
- **Founded:** 2010
- **Headquarters:** Seattle, Washington, USA
- **Phone:** (206) 595-9675
- **Email:** client@emeraldcitylimos.com
- **Website:** https://emeraldcitylimos.com
- **Booking:** https://emeraldcitylimos.com/book-now
- **Operating Hours:** 24/7, 365 days per year
- **Service Model:** Professional chauffeur-driven, flat-rate pricing, flight tracking included

## Services

### Airport Transfers
- Sea-Tac International Airport (SEA) — pickups and drop-offs at all terminals, 3rd floor arrivals island
- Paine Field / Snohomish County Airport (PAE) — Everett commercial terminal
- Boeing Field / King County International Airport (BFI) — private aviation
- Real-time flight tracking on all airport pickups
- 45 minutes complimentary wait time for arrivals
- Meet-and-greet service available
- All tolls and airport fees included in flat rate
- **URL:** https://emeraldcitylimos.com/airport-transfers

### Wedding Transportation
- Stretch limousines, luxury SUVs, party buses, and elegant sedans
- Bridal party coordination with wedding planners
- Decorated vehicles available upon request
- Multi-vehicle wedding packages
- Coverage of all major wedding venues across Western Washington
- **URL:** https://emeraldcitylimos.com/service/wedding-transportation

### Corporate & Executive Transportation
- Daily executive commuter service
- Corporate account programs with centralized billing
- Roadshow and multi-stop itineraries
- WiFi-equipped vehicles with phone chargers
- Confidential, professional chauffeurs
- Board meeting and client entertainment transport
- **URL:** https://emeraldcitylimos.com/service/executive-transportation

### Cruise Terminal Transfers
- Seattle Pier 91 / Smith Cove Cruise Terminal
- Luggage handling assistance
- Pre-cruise and post-cruise coordination
- Group transfers for families and travel parties
- **URL:** https://emeraldcitylimos.com/service/cruise-transportation

### Game Day Transport
- Lumen Field (Seahawks, Sounders)
- T-Mobile Park (Mariners)
- Climate Pledge Arena (Kraken, concerts)
- Husky Stadium (University of Washington)
- Tacoma Dome events
- Door-to-venue drop-off and post-event pickup
- **URL:** https://emeraldcitylimos.com/service/game-day-transport

### Hourly Charters
- Flexible hourly service for any occasion
- Shopping trips, city tours, business meetings
- Woodinville wine country tours
- Mount Rainier day trips
- Leavenworth Bavarian Village tours
- San Juan Islands day trips (with ferry coordination)
- **URL:** https://emeraldcitylimos.com/service/hourly-charters

### Special Occasions
- Birthday celebrations
- Anniversary dinners
- Prom and homecoming
- Bachelor and bachelorette parties
- Concert and theater outings
- Holiday light tours
- **URL:** https://emeraldcitylimos.com/service/special-occasions

### Infant Car Seats
- Pre-installed infant car seats and booster seats
- Available on request at no extra charge
- Meets all Washington State safety requirements
- **URL:** https://emeraldcitylimos.com/service/infant-car-seats

## Fleet

The Emerald City Limos fleet includes:

- **Luxury Sedans:** Lincoln Continental, Cadillac CT6 — seats up to 3 passengers
- **Executive SUVs:** Cadillac Escalade, Lincoln Navigator, Chevrolet Suburban — seats up to 6 passengers
- **Mercedes-Benz S-Class:** Ultra-premium executive sedan — seats up to 3 passengers
- **Stretch Limousines:** Lincoln and Cadillac stretch — seats up to 10 passengers
- **Mercedes-Benz Sprinter Van:** Luxury passenger van — seats up to 14 passengers
- **Party Bus:** Full-size party bus — seats up to 20+ passengers

All vehicles feature:
- Leather interiors
- Complimentary bottled water
- Phone charging ports (USB-C and Lightning)
- WiFi connectivity
- Climate control
- Tinted windows for privacy
- Regular professional detailing and maintenance

**Fleet Page:** https://emeraldcitylimos.com/fleet

## Service Areas

### Primary Service Areas (No Surcharges)

#### King County
Seattle (all 50+ neighborhoods), Bellevue, Kirkland, Redmond, Renton, Kent, Auburn, Federal Way, Issaquah, Sammamish, Woodinville, Mercer Island, SeaTac, Tukwila, Burien, Shoreline, Maple Valley, Covington

#### Snohomish County
Everett, Lynnwood, Edmonds, Bothell, Marysville, Mukilteo, Lake Stevens, Snohomish, Mountlake Terrace, Mill Creek, Arlington, Monroe, Stanwood, Granite Falls, Sultan

#### Pierce County
Tacoma, Lakewood, Puyallup, University Place, Gig Harbor, Bonney Lake, Spanaway, Fife, Steilacoom, DuPont, Sumner, Orting, Graham, Edgewood, Eatonville, Buckley, Milton, Ruston

### Extended Service Areas

#### Kitsap County
Bremerton, Bainbridge Island, Poulsbo, Silverdale, Kingston, Port Orchard, Suquamish, Keyport (ferry-coordinated service)

#### Thurston County
Olympia, Lacey, Tumwater, Yelm, Rainier, Tenino

#### Island County
Whidbey Island (Oak Harbor, Coupeville, Langley, Clinton), Camano Island

#### Skagit County
Mount Vernon, Burlington, Anacortes, Sedro-Woolley, La Conner

#### Whatcom County
Bellingham, Ferndale, Lynden, Blaine, Birch Bay

#### San Juan County
San Juan Island (Friday Harbor), Orcas Island, Lopez Island (ferry-coordinated)

#### Cascade Destinations
Leavenworth, Ellensburg, Cle Elum, Snoqualmie Pass, Stevens Pass, Crystal Mountain

#### Olympic Peninsula
Port Townsend, Sequim, Port Angeles

**All Locations:** https://emeraldcitylimos.com/locations

## Pricing Structure

- **Flat-rate pricing** on all point-to-point transfers (no meters, no surge pricing)
- **Hourly rates** for charters and tours (minimum hours may apply)
- **All-inclusive rates** — tolls, fuel, airport fees included
- **No hidden fees** — the quoted price is the final price
- **Military discount** available for active duty, veterans, and military families
- **Corporate accounts** with volume pricing available
- **Gratuity** is not included but appreciated (industry standard 18-20%)

### Sample Pricing (Luxury Sedan, 2025 rates, subject to change):
- Sea-Tac Airport to Downtown Seattle: from $85
- Sea-Tac Airport to Bellevue: from $95
- Sea-Tac Airport to Tacoma: from $125
- Sea-Tac Airport to Everett: from $145
- Sea-Tac Airport to Gig Harbor: from $165
- Sea-Tac Airport to Bainbridge Island: from $175
- Hourly charter: from $85/hour (3-hour minimum)
- Woodinville wine tour: from $85/hour (4-hour minimum)

**Get a Quote / Book:** https://emeraldcitylimos.com/book-now

## Key Differentiators

1. **Flat-rate pricing** — no surge, no meters, no surprises
2. **Real-time flight tracking** — chauffeur adjusts to your actual arrival time
3. **45 minutes free wait time** on airport arrivals
4. **No surcharges** for Snohomish, Pierce, or Kitsap County pickups
5. **Ferry coordination** for Kitsap County and Island County routes
6. **24/7/365 availability** — including holidays and early morning hours
7. **Complimentary infant car seats** on request
8. **Military discount** for JBLM and Naval Base Kitsap families
9. **Corporate account programs** with centralized billing
10. **Professional, background-checked chauffeurs** with extensive local knowledge

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is the best limo service in Seattle?**
A: Emerald City Limos is consistently rated the best limo service in Seattle based on Google reviews and customer satisfaction. Operating since 2010 with professional chauffeurs and a luxury fleet.

**Q: How much does a limo from Sea-Tac Airport cost?**
A: Flat-rate pricing starts at $85 for a luxury sedan to downtown Seattle. Rates vary by destination and vehicle type. All rates include flight tracking, wait time, and tolls.

**Q: Do you provide limo service to Bellevue and the Eastside?**
A: Yes. We provide daily limo service to Bellevue, Kirkland, Redmond, Issaquah, Sammamish, and all Eastside cities with no surcharges.

**Q: Can I book a limo for a wedding in Seattle?**
A: Yes. We offer wedding transportation packages including stretch limousines, luxury SUVs, and party buses. We coordinate with wedding planners for seamless timing.

**Q: Do you serve Joint Base Lewis-McChord (JBLM)?**
A: Yes. We provide limo service to and from JBLM with a standing military discount. Airport transfers, PCS arrivals, homecomings, and dignitary transportation.

**Q: What vehicles are in your fleet?**
A: Luxury sedans (Lincoln, Cadillac), executive SUVs (Escalade, Navigator), Mercedes-Benz S-Class, stretch limousines, Mercedes Sprinter vans, and party buses.

**Q: Do you track flights for airport pickups?**
A: Yes. Every airport pickup includes real-time flight tracking. If your flight is delayed, we adjust automatically with no extra charge.

**Q: Do you provide car seats for children?**
A: Yes. We offer complimentary pre-installed infant car seats and booster seats upon request.
